title: Movie Or Story Poster 2 AI
sourceTitle: Movie Or Story Poster 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: cinematic story poster built around clockmaker discovering a tiny glowing city inside a pocket watch. Subject: clockmaker discovering a tiny glowing city inside a pocket watch is the hero narrative image, captured at the emotionally charged moment described by the precise moment a hidden miniature world wakes up inside the opened watch. Scene: dusty Victorian workshop with brass gears, magnifying lenses, candlelight, and rain streaking the window provides cinematic props, spatial depth, and story atmosphere. Composition: Fixed cinematic poster composition with one dominant story subject, clear dramatic focal point, readable title placement, and polished hierarchy. Style: High-end cinematic poster art with dramatic lighting, tactile detail, narrative atmosphere, refined color grade, and collectible key-art finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: FIELD NOTES appears as short readable poster title or story text, integrated without clutter. Signature Elements: clockmaker discovering a tiny glowing city inside a pocket watch, dusty Victorian workshop with brass gears, magnifying lenses, candlelight, and rain streaking the window, the precise moment a hidden miniature world wakes up inside the opened watch, and FIELD NOTES define the reusable cinematic story-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Movie Or Story Poster 2 Field Notes

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: cinematic story poster built around sleeping glass violin slowly filling with living fireflies. Subject: sleeping glass violin slowly filling with living fireflies is the hero narrative image, captured at the emotionally charged moment described by the instant silent music becomes visible as fireflies gathering inside the transparent violin. Scene: abandoned concert hall with velvet seats, moonbeam from cracked ceiling, dust motes, and broken music stands provides cinematic props, spatial depth, and story atmosphere. Composition: Fixed cinematic poster composition with one dominant story subject, clear dramatic focal point, readable title placement, and polished hierarchy. Style: High-end cinematic poster art with dramatic lighting, tactile detail, narrative atmosphere, refined color grade, and collectible key-art finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: AFTER RAIN appears as short readable poster title or story text, integrated without clutter. Signature Elements: sleeping glass violin slowly filling with living fireflies, abandoned concert hall with velvet seats, moonbeam from cracked ceiling, dust motes, and broken music stands, the instant silent music becomes visible as fireflies gathering inside the transparent violin, and AFTER RAIN define the reusable cinematic story-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
